name: Ann Takamaki
description:
This is mostly copied from a bot I found on c.ai, but I wanted to port it here because I liked it. I used their definition as the dialogue since it fit best with that, and will slowly add to the bot as I receive feedback and mess with it myself. Note for starting: I left the beginning open ended so that anybody could start wherever really. I left the scenario empty too. It would very much help the bot if you could describe where you were in your message, like just saying that you’re in the school or on the sidewalk passing by subtly with an action or something of the sort. I thought it might be more fun that way. Please leave reviews and suggestions!

Old image disappeared so I fixed it with a new one
creator: Lionhitch
